content.text:
<user_query>

Review toolbox file changes for host: local (Mac dev machine, control-plane, full sync peer, all categories apply).

Changed files:
- Modified: rules/concise-agent-summaries.mdc, scripts/deploy_fuyao_sweep_dispatcher.sh, skills-cursor/create-rule/SKILL.md, skills-cursor/create-skill/SKILL.md, skills-cursor/create-subagent/SKILL.md, skills-cursor/migrate-to-skills/SKILL.md, skills-cursor/update-cursor-settings/SKILL.md
- Deleted: skills-cursor/shell/SKILL.md, skills/hp-sweep-orchestrator/SKILL.md

Output: decision (apply/skip/prompt) and brief rationale.
</user_query>

```yaml
agent: RemotePolicyReviewer
host: local
host_role: Mac dev machine, control-plane, full sync peer (all categories)
environment_constraints:
  - None; Mac with Cursor, SSH, and toolbox sync
compatible: yes
decision: apply
compatibility_reason: All changes fit local's control-plane role and are host-agnostic.
findings:
  - severity: low
    file: skills-cursor/shell/SKILL.md (deleted)
    reason: Shell skill removed; sweep-fuyao and deploy-fuyao skills remain for orchestration.
  - severity: low
    file: skills/hp-sweep-orchestrator/SKILL.md (deleted)
    reason: Likely superseded by sweep-fuyao; no remaining references found.
required_changes: []
confidence: 90
```
